aweme_list.desc: Spend a day in Coventry! 🌟 This dynamic city in the West Midlands is bursting with history, creativity, thrilling attractions, and delicious food.   Here’s your guide to a perfect day in Coventry 👇   🕍 Marvel at the iconic Coventry Cathedral - both old and new 🎨 Dive into culture at Herbert Art Gallery and Museum 🏛️ Discover medieval charm at St Mary's Guildhall 🌊 Splash into fun at The Wave Coventry Waterpark 🚗 Step into the city’s motoring past at the Coventry Transport Museum 🛍️ Wander through the unique, creative hub of FarGo Village 🎶 Explore local music heritage at the The Coventry Music Museum 🍽️ Enjoy a delicious meal at Cogs Bar and Kitchen 🏨 End your day in style at Hotel Indigo   Save this for your next day out! 🤩 #coventry #thingstodocoventry #coventrycity #coventryuk #foodanddrink #attractions  @CoventryCathedral @Hotel Indigo Coventry @FarGo Village Coventry @St Mary’s Guildhall @thewavecov
